title: gnaphalon saxatile
intro: Gnaphalon saxatile, also known as the small-leaved gnaphalium or sea pinks, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gnaphalon saxatile include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as acne, wounds, and eczema. In herbal preparations, Gnaphalon saxatile can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
